mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO qa_block_new_rela_stock_his
( block_new_id, date, stock_id_list, result, gn_result, pthy_lv1_result, pthy_lv2_result, pthy_lv3_result, yjhy_lv1_result, yjhy_lv2_result, yjhy_lv3_result )
VALUES
( #{item.blockNewId}, #{item.date}, #{item.stockIdList}, #{item.result}, #{item.gnResult}, #{item.pthyLv1Result}, #{item.pthyLv2Result}, #{item.pthyLv3Result}, #{item.yjhyLv1Result}, #{item.yjhyLv2Result}, #{item.yjhyLv3Result} )
